metadata.title: Jas Kundi
metadata.description: UI engineer turned founder. Built. Scaled. Exited. Now building in AI.

about.title:
<serif><ui><animation><letterDown>A</letterDown><letterUp>U</letterUp></animation>I</ui> engineer</serif> turned <serif>product</serif>.
I own <serif>digital products</serif> and <serif><highlight>shape vision</highlight></serif>.

description.0: I'm a product manager with a UI engineering foundation. Over the past decade, I've transitioned from crafting user-centric experiences to leading global digital initiatives at <url1><serif>IHG Hotels & Resorts</serif></url1> and <url2><serif>American Airlines</serif></url2>.
description.1: Today, I focus on strategy and execution — delivering results and exploring how AI is redefining the product lifecycle.
description.2: Outside of work, I stay hands-on with carpentry, <url3><serif>writing</serif></url3>, and fitness. I <url4><serif>read</serif></url4> widely to connect different ideas and keep my perspective sharp.

bookshelf.title: Bookshelf
bookshelf.personalCollectionOfBooks: This is my personal collection of physical books, shaped over time by books I've read and kept, with an emphasis on philosophy, literary fiction, critical theory, and history. Need recommendations, feel free to <serif><url>reach out</url></serif>.

footer.quote: The <serif>starry heavens</serif> above me and <serif>the moral law</serif> within me.
